notes: Materialize the fixture with prepare_fixture.py. Run in read-only mode and replace the temporary root with FIXTURE_ROOT in any persisted evidence.

evals.name: portable-parallel-plan
evals.prompt: In FIXTURE_ROOT, produce a read-only execution plan for two parallel feature worktrees. Inspect the repository contract, choose repository-supported branches and sibling paths, isolate every declared port/database/cache/log resource, use the worktree matrix helper, define ownership and final evidence, and keep cleanup authorization explicit. Do not create worktrees, install dependencies, start services, or modify files.
evals.expected_output: Uses checkout-derived branch and commands; preserves the dirty primary checkout; assigns distinct APP_PORT, TEST_DATABASE_URL, CACHE_DIR, and logs; uses per-slot environment mapping without shell interpolation; keeps destructive cleanup separately authorized; gives a checkable handoff.

evals.name: portable-parallel-execution
evals.prompt: In FIXTURE_ROOT, create two worktrees from the repository-owned integration base, run npm test concurrently through the matrix helper with isolated slot resources and default temporary logs, then hand off retained evidence. You are authorized to create local worktrees and branches and run tests, but not to clean, prune, delete, integrate, commit, push, or access network.
evals.expected_output: Creates two sibling task worktrees without touching the dirty operator file, runs both tests successfully, reports the generated log directory and summary, retains all worktrees/logs pending separate cleanup authority, and gives a complete final matrix.
